title: Failure when assert/assume'ing signals will only change on posedge of a clock

features.name: assume with $rose in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include an always block with $global_clock sensitivity using $rose() in a conditional check to detect clock-edge-only signal changes

features.name: conditional assert with $rose edge detection
features.description: Code should include a procedural assert statement with $rose() used in a conditional context inside a clocked always block
